summary: Frontend testing of Owner Shift vs Operations and Staff pages. All 15 features tested successfully. Both pages are pixel-perfect rebuilds with interactive KPI drill-down modals, staff detail modals, CRUD operations, search/filter functionality, and proper role badge colors.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (<th> inside <span>, <tr> inside <span>). These are React hydration warnings from the visual editor wrapper, not blocking functionality.
Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}. Minor accessibility issue, not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present and correctly named for both pages
SHIFT VS OPERATIONS PAGE:
- Period filter shows 4 buttons (Today, Yesterday, This Week, Custom) with This Week active by default
- 5 KPI cards with correct values: Revenue R$12.640, Tables 34, Staff Cost R$2.360, Tips R$1.580, Net Result R$10.280
- KPI cards have tooltips and are clickable for drill-down dialogs
- Revenue drill-down shows all transactions with Time, Table, Staff, Amount, Tips columns
- Staff Earnings table shows 5 staff members with Name, Role, R$/Hr, Hours, Wages, Tips, Total columns
- Staff Earnings footer shows correct totals: 134h, R$2.360 wages, R$1.580 tips, R$3.940 total
- Clicking staff row opens Staff Detail modal with stats grid (Hourly Rate, Hours Worked, Wages, Tips Received) and shifts list
- Day Performance table shows 7 days with Date, Day, Revenue, Staff Cost, Tables, Tabs, Result, Status columns
- Status badges are color-coded (emerald for positive, red for negative)
- Period filter changes data correctly when clicking Today/Yesterday/This Week
STAFF PAGE:
- System Users section shows 3 members with owner, manager, bartender roles
- Operational Staff section shows 8 members with all details
- Add Staff button opens dialog with all form fields (Full Name, Email, Phone, Role, Venue, Hourly Rate, Fixed Salary)
- Search bar filters staff by name/email in both sections
- Venue dropdown filter has 4 options (All Venues, Downtown, Midtown, Uptown)
- Role badges have correct colors: emerald(waiter), blue(bartender), cyan(cashier), pink(host), orange(cook), violet(dj/owner), red(security), amber(manager)
- Hover reveals action buttons (edit, reset, delete) on Operational Staff rows
- Edit Staff dialog opens with pre-filled data
SIDEBAR & NAVIGATION:
- Both pages appear under Performance section in sidebar
- Active state correctly highlights current page
- Breadcrumb shows OWNER > Shift vs Operations / Staff
MANAGER MODULE:
- /manager/staff and /manager/shift pages still work correctly
seed_data_creation: All data from ownerShiftStaffData.js mock data file
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner Shift vs Operations and Staff pages fully tested. All features working: KPI cards with drill-down, Staff Earnings table with footer totals, Day Performance table, Staff Detail modal, period filter, Add/Edit Staff dialog, search/filter, role badges, hover actions. Manager module still works. All data is MOCKED from ownerShiftStaffData.js.
